home.title: Raid Scope
home.description: Search for characters to build your raid roster, arrange 5-player parties in the party frame, and check buff coverage.

meta.title: Raid Scope — WoW Raid Composition Analyzer
meta.description: Free WoW raid composition tool for raid leaders. Search characters, check buff & utility coverage, and arrange 5-player parties with drag & drop. Built for World of Warcraft Midnight Season 1. Powered by Raider.IO & Warcraft Logs.
meta.ogTitle: Raid Scope — WoW Raid Composition Analyzer
meta.ogDescription: Free WoW raid tool for raid leaders. Character search, buff & utility coverage analysis, and party frame arrangement — all in one place.
meta.keywords: Raid Scope, WoW, World of Warcraft, wow raid builder, wow raid composition, raid composition analyzer, buff coverage, utility coverage, raid leader tool, wow raid planner, Midnight Season 1, party frame, Raider.IO, Warcraft Logs, M+ score

label.heroism: Bloodlust / Heroism / Time Warp / Primal Rage
label.blessingOfTheBronze: Blessing of the Bronze — 15% CDR on major movement ability
label.skyfury: Skyfury Totem — 2% Mastery, 20% chance extra auto attack
label.blessingOfSacrifice: Blessing of Sacrifice — 30% damage redirected to caster (12s)
label.guardianSpirit: Guardian Spirit — 60% healing↑, revive at 40% HP on death (10s)
label.innervate: Innervate — Target casts without mana cost (8s)
label.layOnHands: Lay on Hands — Restore 100% max HP
label.lifeCocoon: Life Cocoon — Large absorb + 50% periodic healing↑ (12s)
label.auraMastery: Aura Mastery — Devotion Aura 12% / Concentration Aura silence immunity (8s)
label.powerWordBarrier: Power Word: Barrier — 20% damage reduction in area (10s)
label.revival: Revival — Massive group heal + dispel magic/poison/disease
label.rewind: Rewind — Heal 30% of damage taken over last 5s
label.abominationLimb: Abomination Limb — Pull nearby enemies periodically, slow (12s)
label.curseOfTongues: Curse of Tongues — 30% slower enemy cast time
label.gorefiendGrasp: Gorefiend's Grasp — AoE pull all nearby enemies
label.leapOfFaith: Leap of Faith — Pull one ally to you
label.magePortal: Portal — Quick travel to major cities
label.rescue: Rescue — Carry ally to target location, remove movement impairment
label.ritualOfSummoning: Ritual of Summoning — Remote summon (needs 2 helpers)
label.soulstone: Soulstone — Battle rez / auto-revive on death if pre-applied
label.tremorTotem: Tremor Totem — Remove Fear/Charm/Sleep from nearby allies
